site_tagline: Any {{activity_device}}. Any screen. Beautiful {{activity_noun_plural}} from home.
hero_copy: Jump into curated scenic {{activity_verb}} routes, then launch a fullscreen {{activity_noun_singular}} on your laptop, tablet, or TV.
catalog_error_detail: Run the app through the local server and try again.
catalog_empty_detail: Add entries to routes/catalog.json to populate the catalog.
catalog_no_match_detail: Try a different duration, scenery, intensity, or search term.
candidate_disclaimer: Review mode is intentionally hidden from the public catalog. Open it with ?review=1 or #review when you want to triage candidates. These entries load from routes/candidate-backlog.json for review only. They are not mixed into the featured {{activity_noun_singular}} catalog until promoted into routes/catalog.json.
candidate_empty_detail: Add entries to routes/candidate-backlog.json for review.
candidate_decision_saved: {{label}} saved locally. Export decisions to send them back to Copilot.
candidate_note_saved: Note saved locally. Export decisions to send them back to Copilot.
candidate_copy_success: {{count}} review {{decision_label}} copied. Paste this back to Copilot.
candidate_copy_fallback: {{count}} review {{decision_label}} shown below. Select and copy it back to Copilot.
player_placeholder: Select a route to load the {{activity_noun_singular}} video.
player_embed_not_allowed: Embedding is not marked as allowed for this route. Use Open source instead.
selected_description_default: Choose a scenic {{activity_noun_singular}} card above. The player supports YouTube embeds, fullscreen mode, and source links for browser fallback.
local_summary: Favorites, recent {{activity_noun_plural}}, and filter preferences stay local to this browser.
recent_empty: Select or start a {{activity_noun_singular}} to build recent routes.
export_success: Local backup downloaded. No account or cloud sync needed.
copy_success: Backup JSON copied to clipboard and shown below.
copy_fallback: Backup JSON shown below. Select and copy it to save a manual backup.
import_success: Local backup imported. Stale route IDs were ignored.
install_available: Install available for offline app shell.
update_ready: Update ready. Refresh when you’re ready.
offline_ready: Offline — cached routes and the app shell remain available.
online_ready: Back online. New route data can load again.
footer_copy_1: Made by Scott Hanselman. There is no backend database, account system, or social login.
footer_copy_2: Favorites, recent {{activity_noun_plural}}, and preferences stay in this browser on this device. Use Export data or Import data to move a local backup between browsers, and Reset local data whenever you want a fresh start.
footer_copy_3: {{site_name}} is an installable PWA for an app-like fullscreen {{activity_noun_singular}} experience. Videos remain hosted by their original creators and platforms; {{site_name}} only links or embeds them.
footer_copy_4: Prefer {{sister_site_activity}}? {{sister_site_name}} is the same app, tuned for {{sister_site_activity}}.
footer_copy_mycadence: For more cadence tracking fun, try My Cadence on iOS and Android.
catalog_loaded_empty: routes/catalog.json loaded, but it does not contain any routes yet.
catalog_load_error: The route catalog could not be loaded. Start the static server and refresh.
sensor_status_idle: Connect a cadence sensor to start.
sensor_status_unsupported: Bluetooth cadence sensors are not supported in this browser.
sensor_status_reconnecting: Reconnecting to your saved cadence sensor…
sensor_status_saved_not_found: Saved sensor not found. Turn it on, then connect again.
sensor_status_reconnect_unavailable: This browser cannot reconnect saved Bluetooth devices yet.
sensor_status_gatt_unavailable: This sensor does not expose a Bluetooth GATT interface.
